75 Sydney Street, New Farm

ABOUT US

Brisbane's "Little Italy"

New Farm is one of Brisbane's most beloved inner suburbs — leafy, vibrant, and lined with acclaimed restaurants, riverside cafés, and independent galleries. Edward Lodge has been welcoming guests to this remarkable neighbourhood since the early 1900s.

Whether you're here for business meetings in the CBD or exploring south-east Queensland at leisure, Edward Lodge offers the warmth and personality of a family-run boutique hotel — without compromising on comfort or convenience.

OUR STORY

What our guests say

★★★★★

"Perfect location, genuinely delicious breakfast and incredibly attentive staff. Everything we needed and more. We will definitely be back."
